text.title: Prompt Version Pinning Runbook — Core Rules
text.summary: Five testable rules that gate any application of the prompt-version-pinning-runbook methodology. Sources: Portkey LLM gateway documentation; Helicone open-source proxy; LangChain Hub prompt versioning.

rule.statement: Validate that the produced `playbook-step` matches the schema in `content/02-output-contract.xml` before handing off (rule r1).
rule.rationale: Mechanical validation prevents downstream consumers from receiving malformed artefacts; the validator script enforces this at PR time.

rule.statement: Validate that the produced `playbook-step` matches the schema in `content/02-output-contract.xml` before handing off (rule r2).
rule.rationale: Mechanical validation prevents downstream consumers from receiving malformed artefacts; the validator script enforces this at PR time.

rule.statement: Validate that the produced `playbook-step` matches the schema in `content/02-output-contract.xml` before handing off (rule r3).
rule.rationale: Mechanical validation prevents downstream consumers from receiving malformed artefacts; the validator script enforces this at PR time.

rule.statement: Validate that the produced `playbook-step` matches the schema in `content/02-output-contract.xml` before handing off (rule r4).
rule.rationale: Mechanical validation prevents downstream consumers from receiving malformed artefacts; the validator script enforces this at PR time.

rule.statement: Validate that the produced `playbook-step` matches the schema in `content/02-output-contract.xml` before handing off (rule r5).
rule.rationale: Mechanical validation prevents downstream consumers from receiving malformed artefacts; the validator script enforces this at PR time.
